agreements_walked: Area Development Agreement via Item 17 chart

burdens.obligation: 5-year term from store opening date; may be shortened to match lease term
6% royalty + 3% advertising on gross sales; $358+/mo tech; renewal $12,500; transfer up to $20K; remodel $25K-$150K every 5 years
Franchisee locates site; franchisor approves in sole discretion; 1,000-1,500 sqft; must submit fully-executed lease before construction
Generally franchisor constructs store at franchisee expense; $5,000 project management fee; franchisor-designated contractors and A&E consultants
Must complete all 3 phases; failure may result in franchise termination; franchisee pays travel/lodging; store managers may be required to train
Must operate per Manuals (419 pages); must allow inspections; must maintain POS with franchisor access; must purchase 100% of ongoing inventory from franchisor or approved suppliers
Must maintain minimum $60,000 wholesale inventory at all times; must stock per planogram with max 10% non-planogram products
30-day cure for curable defaults (5 days for payment); extensive non-curable default list including 3+ defaults in 12 months
Termination of any agreement triggers right to terminate ALL other agreements with franchisee/affiliates/principals
All transfers require prior approval; ROFR for controlling interest; transferee must qualify, train, assume obligations; escrow required; general release required
During term: no competing business. Post-term: 1 year, 5 miles from Approved Location + any GNC Store + any franchisor outlet + Internet
All owners AND spouses must personally guarantee all obligations; unlimited personal liability
On default termination: max(avg monthly royalty 2yr, avg monthly royalty 12mo) × remaining months
Arbitration in Pennsylvania; PA law; jury waiver; confession of judgment; forum non conveniens waiver
$2M GL per occurrence/aggregate; full replacement property; BI equal to greater of $250K or annual gross sales; workers comp per law; umbrella $2M-$8M for multi-unit
Must reimburse franchisor for damages/expenses related to franchise operation
Pay liquidated damages; de-identify; return all materials/POS; franchisor option to purchase inventory/equipment at depreciated value; comply with noncompete; surrender premises if franchisor elects
Transfer within 6 months; franchisor may operate at $2,000/week
Must sign then-current form which MAY HAVE MATERIALLY DIFFERENT TERMS; must demonstrate profitability; general release; remodel if required; $12,500 fee
Franchisor may set minimum and/or maximum prices to fullest extent of law
Must purchase and maintain POS from franchisor; hardware refresh every 3-5 years; franchisor has unlimited access to all POS data; proprietary software returned at termination
1-year protective period only; thereafter ROFR only; franchisor sells via 10+ channels within territory; territory may be reduced at renewal
Must include franchisor notice/cure/access provisions; no radius restrictions for GNC; no protected territory language; franchisor may enter premises
Must submit all offering materials for review + $5,000 fee; 30-day advance notice for franchisor ROFR
